nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
JessJenn. A full-body photo of a woman standing heroically on top of a small round marble pedestal in front of the dominant skyline of a futuristic 30th Century Manhattan that looms large and imposing, towering behind her at sunset, rendered as a glossy quasi-3D fashion doll with polished vinyl skin. She has long platinum blonde hair with soft waves and small regal braid details, large purple eyes, blonde eyebrows, and glamorous pink-purple makeup. Her hips are wide, her legs thick and strong and she has large breasts. She wears a pale icy blue bandeau top with silver filigree embroidery and a central purple amethyst jewel brooch, paired with matching bikini bottoms decorated with silver tracery and purple amethyst accents. Her bikini bottoms are full coverage and her pussy is NOT visible. Her sandals are elegant open-toe strappy high heels in purple amethyst tones, coordinated with silver-and-amethyst jewelry.

She wears a luxurious but not oversized seven-point silver spiked crown set with purple amethysts. Her right arm is raised high overhead holding a lit jeweled torch, made of polished silver metal with purple amethyst stones and a bright orange flame. The torch aligns with a radiant sunburst in the sky, creating a heroic halo of golden light. Behind her are dramatic glowing clouds, warm cinematic sunset rays, water reflections, and the powerful dominating future Manhattan skyline in the background. The mood is classic torchbearer studio-logo-inspired. Use heroic pinup poses: confident stance, left hand on hip or left arm flexed, calm noble expression, subtle camera-facing or three-quarter gaze. Full-body head-to-heels framing.
